title: Operating a static-safe portfolio OS
note: I am actively maintaining committed project snapshots, manifest branding, and project storytelling so live proof stays accurate without unsafe browser-side API calls.

title: Making systems feel product-grade
note: I am tightening AWS, AI, and frontend projects so each one feels like a production-style product, not a disconnected demo.

title: Using motion with stronger visual hierarchy
note: I am learning how motion, depth, and contrast can improve comprehension while still keeping technical clarity.

title: Keeping repos and portfolio aligned
note: I am using committed metadata snapshots so future project changes reflect in the portfolio with less manual rework.
